generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing real-time speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor providing real-time steering data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw visual data from Intel D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data after DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks from Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series vehicle state data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between Physical and Digital Twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU-accelerated processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ISO23247Architecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing point cloud data using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for generating post-operation reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, VehicleStateReport
]

instance ACCCommandExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system execution command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandExecution
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualization
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state for driver trust"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-operation analysis reports generated from time-series data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks for situational awareness"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation controlled via Physical Twin Entity's Actuation FE"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency braking commands executed through vehicle's hardware"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity containing sensor and actuator components"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, EmergencyBrakingActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity for data processing and services"
    base:contains PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for remote interaction"
    base:contains RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for motor speed adjustments, steering angle commands, and emergency braking generated by the ACC Controlling FE and transmitted via the Actuation FE to the physical vehicle's hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end network latency (per 3GPP 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across components for safety-critical coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; data flows via ROS2 within entities and Wi-Fi between entities."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and compliance validation, and during operation for monitoring and optimization; covers 'as manufactured' (testing) and 'as operated' (real-time) phases of the vehicle lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation follows ISO 15622 Performance Class I (no road curvature); latency and synchronization requirements (100 ms) ensure safety-critical operation; no explicit verification/validation details beyond standards compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions for all data streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted externally (cloud); User Entity accessible via remote UI for operators and developers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical design with 100 ms latency and clock synchronization constraints; no specific cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) detailed in the document."
]
